changes.description: ProductTile override — wraps base tile with Quick View overlay bar (slide-up on hover, always visible on mobile)
QuickViewModal component — Chakra modal wrapping ProductView with lazy loading, error states, and a11y
19 unit tests for ProductTile overlay bar rendering, interaction, a11y, and edge cases
21 unit tests for QuickViewModal shell, content, hook integration, error handling, and a11y
Add compiled en-US i18n strings for Quick View button and modal labels
Add compiled en-GB i18n strings for Quick View button and modal labels
Add compiled en-XA pseudo-locale i18n strings for Quick View
Add source en-US translation messages for Quick View feature
Add source en-GB translation messages for Quick View feature
Exclude e2e/ directory from Jest test discovery to prevent Playwright/Jest conflicts
13 Playwright E2E tests for Quick View button visibility, modal lifecycle, a11y, and keyboard navigation
Removed obsolete smoke test file superseded by feature-specific E2E specs
